comment: Region (e): the Frigid River, the beaches, Sandy Cave, and Aragain Falls up onto the rainbow. The boat is the original's mechanics on one object: inflate-with-pump flips state deflated->inflated and makes it a vehicle; BOARDING with any of the six sharp things (sword, nasty knife, rusty knife, axe, stiletto, sceptre — the `pointy` property) punctures it, while PUT/DROP puncture keys on `weapon` (the sceptre is safe to stow, which is the classic's own trick); rename-on-inflate is deliberately not modeled (one name, state-keyed examine text — rename_object is not a rule kind by design). The river current is the world conveyor daemon (delays 4/4/3/2 per the ZIL speed table); the original's over-the-falls death at River 5 is a refusal here (the current simply ends — documented relaxation, the canonical route lands at Sandy Beach). Digging Sandy Cave follows the original count: the third shovelful reveals the scarab, the fourth collapses the hole fatally. The pot of gold is authored offstage; region 05's sceptre-wave rule moves it to End of Rainbow when the rainbow goes solid. Drop-a-weapon-while-aboard and attack-from-the-boat punctures are not modeled (documented relaxation).

rooms.title: Frigid River
rooms.seed: the cold green Frigid River below the dam, a landing on the west shore
rooms.description: You are on the Frigid River in the vicinity of the Dam. The river flows quietly here. There is a landing on the west shore.

up.text: You cannot go upstream due to strong currents.

east.text: The White Cliffs prevent your landing here.

rooms.title: Frigid River
rooms.seed: the river between white cliffs and wet rocks, the dam gone from view
rooms.description: The river turns a corner here making it impossible to see the Dam. The White Cliffs loom along the east bank and large rocks prevent landing on the west.

land.text: There is no safe landing spot here.

east.text: The White Cliffs prevent your landing here.

west.text: Just in time you steer away from the rocks.

up.text: You cannot go upstream due to strong currents.

rooms.title: Frigid River
rooms.seed: the river descending into a valley, a narrow beach under the cliffs, a far rumbling
rooms.description: The river descends here into a valley. There is a narrow beach on the west shore below the cliffs. In the distance a faint rumbling can be heard.

east.text: The White Cliffs prevent your landing here.

up.text: You cannot go upstream due to strong currents.

rooms.title: Frigid River
rooms.seed: the river running faster, a sandy beach east, a red buoy riding the current
rooms.description: The river is running faster here, and the sound from ahead is unmistakably rushing water. On the east shore is a sandy beach. A small area of beach can also be seen below the cliffs on the west shore.

land.text: You can land either to the east or the west.

up.text: You cannot go upstream due to strong currents.

rooms.title: Frigid River
rooms.seed: the river gathering itself for Aragain Falls, an island splitting the current, a rocky shore east
rooms.description: The sound of rushing water is nearly deafening here, and the mist ahead marks where the river stops being a river. An island splits the current, and a rocky shore lies along the east.

up.text: You cannot go upstream due to strong currents.

down.text: That way lies the bottom of Aragain Falls, at speed and briefly.

rooms.title: White Cliffs Beach
rooms.seed: a narrow strip of beach at the base of the towering White Cliffs
rooms.description: You are on a narrow strip of beach which runs along the base of the White Cliffs. There is a narrow path heading south along the cliffs, and a tight passage leads west into the rock.

south.blocked_text: The path is too narrow to squeeze past with the boat.

west.blocked_text: The passage is too narrow to squeeze through with the boat.

launch.blocked_text: You have nothing under you fit to launch.

rooms.title: White Cliffs Beach
rooms.seed: a rocky narrow beach beside the White Cliffs, the river hurrying past
rooms.description: You are on a rocky, narrow strip of beach beside the White Cliffs. A narrow path leads north along the shore.

north.blocked_text: The path is too narrow to squeeze past with the boat.

launch.blocked_text: You have nothing under you fit to launch.

rooms.title: Shore
rooms.seed: the east shore of the river above the falls, a long path running north to south
rooms.description: You are on the east shore of the river. The water here seems somewhat treacherous, as though rehearsing for the falls. A path travels from north to south along the shore.

launch.blocked_text: You have nothing under you fit to launch.

rooms.title: Sandy Beach
rooms.seed: a broad sandy beach on the east bank, a shovel standing where somebody quit
rooms.description: You are on a large sandy beach on the east shore of the river, which is flowing quickly by. A path runs beside the river to the south here, and a passage is partially buried in sand to the northeast.

launch.blocked_text: You have nothing under you fit to launch.

rooms.title: Sandy Cave
rooms.seed: a cave half-full of drifted sand, its floor asking to be dug
rooms.description: This is a sand-filled cave whose exit is to the southwest.

rooms.title: Aragain Falls
rooms.seed: the top of Aragain Falls, a 450-foot drop wearing a rainbow that ends in mist
rooms.description: You are at the top of Aragain Falls, an enormous waterfall with a drop of about 450 feet. The only path here is on the north end. A rainbow crosses over the falls to the west and ends somewhere in the mist.

west.blocked_text: Rainbows are lovely, but they are not stairs.

up.blocked_text: Rainbows are lovely, but they are not stairs.

down.text: It's a long way, taken all at once.

rooms.title: On the Rainbow
rooms.seed: standing on a solid rainbow over Aragain Falls, colors underfoot, mist below
rooms.description: You are on top of a rainbow (I bet you never thought you would walk on a rainbow), with a magnificent view of the Falls. The rainbow travels east-west here.

things.name: magic boat
things.seed: a folded pile of seaworthy plastic with a valve, boat by profession when inflated

properties.board_text: You climb into the magic boat, which takes your weight with professional calm.
properties.disembark_text: You climb out of the magic boat onto solid ground.

do.text: At the moment it is a folded pile of plastic with an air valve, dreaming of the river.
It is inflated and appears seaworthy, in the way of boats that call themselves magic.
It is a large sheet of punctured plastic, its seafaring days behind it.
The boat inflates and appears seaworthy. A tan label is lying inside the boat.
Inflating it further would probably burst it.
Air seems less the problem than the hole.
With that? Surely you jest!
You can't deflate the boat while you're in it.
The boat deflates.
It isn't inflated.
Oops! Something sharp seems to have slipped and punctured the boat. The boat deflates to the sounds of hissing, sputtering, and cursing.
In its current condition it will hold air sooner than passengers.
It seems that item didn't agree with the boat, as evidenced by the loud hissing noise issuing therefrom. With a pathetic sputter, the boat deflates, leaving you without.
Well done. The boat is repaired, and needs only air to call itself a boat again.
There is no leak to plug, or nothing that would plug it.

things.name: tan label
things.seed: a tan label sewn into the boat, dense with legal fine print
things.text:
!!!!FROBOZZ MAGIC BOAT COMPANY!!!!

Hello, Sailor!

Instructions for use: To get into a body of water, say "Launch". To get to shore, say "Land" or the direction in which you want to maneuver the boat.

Warranty: This boat is guaranteed against all defects for a period of 76 milliseconds from date of purchase or until first used, whichever comes first.

Warning: This boat is made of thin plastic. Good Luck!

things.name: red buoy
things.seed: a red buoy riding the current with something denser than duty inside it

properties.examined_text: There is something funny about the feel of the buoy: a heaviness low in its belly, as though it swallowed better than it floats.
properties.open_text: The buoy opens at its seam, and inside, wrapped against the water, lies a large emerald.

things.name: large emerald
things.seed: an emerald the size of a plum, green as the river is cold

things.name: shovel
things.seed: a long-handled shovel stood upright in the sand, mid-thought

things.name: sand
things.seed: deep drifted sand with the patience of a thing that buries

do.text: You seem to be digging a hole here.
The hole is getting deeper, but that's about it.
You can see a scarab here in the sand.
The hole collapses, smothering you.
Digging with your hands is slow, clumsy, and beneath you.

things.name: beautiful jeweled scarab
things.seed: a jeweled scarab worked in lapis and gold, older than the empire that lost it

things.name: pot of gold
things.seed: a pot of gold exactly where the stories always said it would be
